text.title: Growth Content Marketing Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Growth Content Marketing.

example.scenario: Solo founder picks pillar=AI-CLI-tools + 5 cluster keywords; 12 briefs covering 3 months; each piece gets 5 derivatives + 50% distribution time; quarterly review shows +200 organic visits.
example.trace: preconditions=true → procedure applied → artefact emitted → validate-script passes
